ogTitle: Wannon vs Wantirna South: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Wannon and Wantirna South.
heading: Wannon vs Wantirna South — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Wannon, Victoria and Wantirna South, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Wannon has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Wantirna South (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Wannon or Wantirna South safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Wannon has a flood risk score of 55/100, while Wantirna South scores 50/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Wannon scores 21/100 for bushfire risk. Wantirna South scores 55/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Wannon or Wantirna South?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Wannon has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.55% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
